channel.title: +गौडीयाः on विश्वासस्य जालक्षेत्रम् Vishvas's website
channel.description: Recent content in +गौडीयाः on विश्वासस्य जालक्षेत्रम् Vishvas's website

item.title: 2026-02-17 Nitya karma abandonment
item.description:
Source: TW

Videos

Source: TW

gauDIya vaiShNavas & nitya karma, varNa-Ashrama-dharma, jIva-gosvAmI, baladeva, kRShNa, jaisingh 2

विस्तारः (द्रष्टुं नोद्यम्)

00:00 - A noble gauDIya vaiShNava mlechCha family 01:36 - nitya-naimittika-karma commitment question 02:45 - Credits and sources (not agreement, ofc) 03:45 - chaitanya, sanAtana-gosvAmI सनातन-गोस्वामी 1488–1558 04:50 - jIva-gosvAmI जीव-गोस्वामी 1513 – 1598 05:30 - bhAgavata-purANa primacy - natural commentary of brahma-sUtra-s, gauDIya vaiShNava mistake in focus. **** 07:55 - तावत् कर्माणि कुर्वीत - jIva-gosvAmI on the shAnkara shrIdhara-gosvAmI.
11:40 - भक्त्य्-आरम्भ एव तु स्वरूपत एव कर्म-त्यागः कर्तव्यः । - jIva. 12:45 - deliberate abandonment of nitya-karmas - बुद्धिपूर्वकता 13:50 - Exceptions - कथञ्चित् क्रियमाणम् अपि … 17:00 - Instructing नित्य-कर्म-त्याग to others. Degeneracy risk. 18:55 - Other exceptions 19:40 - Commentary (BP) opposing the original (BS)? A flaw. **** 20:55 - Unnecessary complexity of decision in abandoning karma - sign of misunderstanding **** 23:30 - विश्वनाथ-चक्रवर्ती 1626–1708 follows jIva 25:30 - baladeva vidyAbhUShaNa बलदेवः 1700–1793 **** 26:00 - jayasiMha 2/ sawai jaisingh, Arya company, rAmAnandi (?) tradition 27:30 - brahma-sUtra-govinda-bhAShya. baladeva’s dilemma 28:46 - baladeva’s hack - lokasangraha applies to all AshramI-s. 30:00 - अनभिभवं च दर्शयति ॥ ३.४.३५ - sUxmA-TIkA 31:50 - Covering a mistake with another 33:00 - Correction to jIva 33:40 - Good job in ensuring non-degeneracy. **** 35:00 - bhagavad-gItA charama-shloka commentary - confirmation 37:20 - kRShNa-deva-sArvabhauma कृष्णदेव-सार्वभौम-भट्टाचार्यः (1750) 38:15 - prameya-ratnAvalI commentary - आश्रमस्थः प्रतिष्ठितो लब्ध-महद्-आसनश् चेत् ॥ 41:00 - Modern gauDIya vaiShNava-s T kRShNa-dAsa parroting jIva gosvAmI **** 42:55 - hari-dAsa-bAbA hindI “translation” - suggests kAmya-karma-tyAga 44:45 - baladeva vidyAbhUShaNa camp - modern acceptance 46:40 - Conclusion, good wishes towards gauDIya vaiShNava victory.
